label: Hidden Gem
verdict: A well-maintained and tastefully modified 130i with a manual gearbox â a rare find in NZ.
whatMakesSpecial: The 130i is one of the last naturally aspirated straight-six hatchbacks with a manual gearbox, offering a pure driving experience.
whyEnthusiastsCare: The E87 130i is revered for its N52 engine, hydraulic steering, and rear-wheel drive layout, making it a favourite among driving purists.

ownerVibe.label: Mature Enthusiast Owner
ownerVibe.reasoning: Extensive maintenance and tasteful modifications suggest a knowledgeable owner who cared for the car.

carsCoffee.description: A manual 130i with tasteful mods will draw attention from BMW enthusiasts and driving purists alike.

communityCredibility.description: The E87 130i is well-regarded in the BMW community for its driving dynamics and the N52 engine.

socialStanding: A sleeper hatch that commands respect from those who know what it is.

specSignificance.note: Rare and highly sought after in the 130i.

priceVerdict.reason: Without a listed price, it's hard to judge value, but a fair range for a well-maintained manual 130i would be $15,000â$20,000 NZD.

reasons: Manual gearbox adds $3â5k over equivalent auto in NZ
Tasteful modifications and maintenance history add value.

priceOutlook.reason: Manual N52-powered BMWs are becoming more desirable as modern cars move away from naturally aspirated engines.

issues.title: N52 Water Pump
issues.detail: Known to fail around 100,000â150,000km; replacement costs $800â1,200 NZD.

issues.title: DISA Valve Failure
issues.detail: Can cause rough idle and loss of power; replacement costs $500â700 NZD.

issues.title: Vanos Solenoid Issues
issues.detail: Can lead to poor performance; replacement costs $300â500 NZD.

steeringFeel.description: The hydraulic steering is direct and communicative, offering excellent feedback and confidence through corners.

engineCharacter.description: The N52 engine is smooth and linear, with a satisfying growl and a willingness to rev.

dailyComfort.description: The Ohlins coilovers provide a firm but controlled ride, which may be harsh for some on rough NZ roads.

overallFun.description: The combination of a manual gearbox, rear-wheel drive, and a lively straight-six makes for an engaging and rewarding drive.

drivingCharacter.summary: A driver's hatchback that combines practicality with genuine driving pleasure.

reasons: Last of the naturally aspirated straight-six hatches

regretRisk.reason: Potential maintenance costs and the firm ride might deter some buyers, but enthusiasts will appreciate its character.

marketTrend.reason: Enthusiast demand for manual, naturally aspirated BMWs is increasing as they become rarer.

reasons: N52 engine maintenance can be costly
Parts availability is good but not cheap.

redFlags.explanation: Without a price, it's difficult to assess value or negotiate effectively.

modPotential.powerCeiling: With a tune and intake, the N52 can push close to 200kW â budget $2,000â4,000 NZD for a reliable setup.
firstMods: Upgraded intake to enhance airflow and sound.
Performance tune for increased power and throttle response.
modPotential.handlingUpgrades: Ohlins coilovers are already fitted, enhancing handling; consider a limited-slip differential for improved traction.
modPotential.partsEcosystem: Strong support from both local and international BMW specialists and forums.
modPotential.collectorRisk: Modifications are generally accepted in the BMW community, but keep original parts for potential resale.

questionsToAsk: Can you provide documentation of the clutch replacement?
Is there any documentation for the modifications and maintenance on Bimmersport?
Have the Vanos solenoids been replaced recently?
Can you confirm the mileage and provide any service records?
enthusiastTake: This 130i is a rare find with its manual gearbox and tasteful mods, but ensure the price aligns with the market and verify the maintenance history.

alternatives.name: Volkswagen Golf GTI Mk5
alternatives.whySuited: A hot hatch with a strong enthusiast following and good aftermarket support.
alternatives.howDiffers: Turbocharged engine offers more torque but lacks the naturally aspirated character of the BMW.

alternatives.name: Mazda MX-5 NC
alternatives.whySuited: Offers a similar engaging driving experience with a lightweight, rear-wheel-drive setup.
alternatives.howDiffers: Two-seater roadster with less practicality but more open-top fun.

alternatives.name: Subaru WRX STI (GD)
alternatives.whySuited: For those wanting AWD grip and rally heritage with similar power output.
alternatives.howDiffers: AWD and turbocharged, offering a different driving dynamic and more practicality.
